mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM posts ORDER BY view_count DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 3
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM posts WHERE category = #{category} ORDER BY view_count DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 3
SELECT like_count FROM posts WHERE post_id = #{postId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_likes WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM post_likes WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET like_count = like_count - 1 WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND like_count > 0
